## Checklist

- [ ] `terraform fmt` has been run
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes
- [ ] Plan output has been reviewed
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive values are hardcoded
- [ ] Changes are scoped to the intended layer only
- [ ] Downstream layers have been considered for impact
